projects.title: Probabilistic Hurricane Track Forecasting with Kalman Filters
projects.description: Developed a probabilistic hurricane tracking system using Kalman filtering to model storm position and velocity under observational uncertainty. Leveraged NOAA IBTrACS data to estimate storm dynamics, perform short- and multi-step forecasts, and evaluate forecast error growth over time. Compared a baseline constant-noise Kalman filter against a feature-adaptive variant, analyzing error distributions, uncertainty calibration, and inherent predictability limits in hurricane motion.

projects.title: The Effect of 2 Strikes on MLB Player Performance
projects.description: Built an interactive dashboard using D3.js and JavaScript to explore MLB player and team statistics. Visualizations include performance trends, comparisons across seasons, and predictive insights leveraging advanced metrics.

projects.title: Chronic Kidney Disease Prediction
projects.description: Developed a machine learning model to predict chronic kidney disease using patient health indicators. Achieved high accuracy through data preprocessing, feature selection, and model optimization.

projects.title: Large-Scale Ensemble Learning for U.S. Housing Prices
projects.description: Created a web application to evaluate house prices using data from over 2 million U.S. homes. Implemented regression models and geodemographic analysis for accurate price predictions.
